title: Kenyan Bitter Brew Coffee
description: A traditional Kenyan coffee recipe with a bitter taste.

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Use filtered water for best taste

instructions: Grind 1 cup of Kenyan Brew Coffee beans.
Heat 1 cup of water in a kettle to 200°F (93°C).
Pour the heated water over the ground coffee in a filter.
Wait for 4 minutes to allow the coffee to brew.
Remove the filter and discard the grounds.
Add 1 teaspoon of sugar if desired.
